servinfo.title: 5th and Reverse Gear Shift Shaft Disassembly and Reassembly

servinfosub.title: Disassembly
servinfosub.ptxt: Disassemble component parts using special tool and hammer.

servinfosub.title: Reassembly
servinfosub.ptxt: Replace or correct parts if necessary and reassemble shafts checking that component parts are in proper order as shown.

item.ptxt: Install 2 steel balls (3) in reverse gear shift arm (1) without fail.
Confirm slit of spring pin (4) is toward 5th gear side (6) and then install spring pin (4) to 5th & reverse gear shift shaft (5).
